title: malvastrum peruvianum var. limense
intro: Malvastrum peruvianum var. limense, also known as Lima Mallow, is a plant species native to Peru and other parts of South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lima Mallow include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Lima Mallow is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate a range of health issues.
